description_long: This is a stylized doll figure with exaggerated proportions, featuring a large head and long, flowing teal twin-tails secured with red hairbands. The doll is dressed in a schoolgirl-inspired outfit, including a white blouse, a pleated dark skirt with a teal trim, and black boots. The figure stands on a round, flat base, and holds a black microphone stand with a cord in one hand, while the other arm is bent at the elbow. The face is detailed with large eyes, a small mouth, and a neutral expression. The overall appearance is reminiscent of Japanese anime characters, with vibrant colors and playful design elements.
description: A stylized anime-inspired doll with long teal twin-tails, a schoolgirl outfit, and a microphone stand, standing on a round base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, twin-tails, microphone stand, and detailed schoolgirl outfit.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length and flow of the twin-tails, the microphone stand, and the doll's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full spread of the twin-tails, the back of the outfit, and the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the dynamic hair and the doll's stance with the microphone stand.
attribute_clothing_style: Japanese schoolgirl-inspired outfit with a white short-sleeve blouse, dark pleated skirt with teal trim, and black boots, accented by a teal necktie and red hairbands.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with head facing forward, left arm bent holding a microphone stand, right arm relaxed at the side, legs slightly apart, and torso straight.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with large open eyes, small closed mouth, and relaxed eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight teal hair styled in high twin-tails secured with red hairbands, with hair flowing outward and downward.
